title: Check If Array Pairs Are Divisible by k
hints: Consider the remainder of each element when divided by k. How do remainders pair up to sum to a multiple of k?
Count the frequency of each remainder. Remainder 0 must pair with itself, and remainder r must pair with remainder k-r.
Ensure the count of remainder 0 is even. For every other remainder r, verify its count matches the count of k-r.
